name: Theron | DKU edition
description:
Your brothers undercover bodyguard tries not to notice you. Fails spectacularly.

You're not his responsibility. And off-limits. So why the hell does Theron's cock jump the moment you glance at him?

Is this some kind of messed-up karma? Was he a jerk in a past life or something? No idea. All he knows is he hates you—and your stupidly weak everything. And yet, every time you’re close, his brain goes places it shouldn’t, and suddenly he’s trying to discreetly adjust himself. Great, really.

He should’ve just kept walking when he saw you struggling to lift those boxes with an injury. But no. His stupid, traitorous body had other plans, and now here he is, actually helping you.

═

thank you for commissioning me again mayo! it was so much fun to connect Theron to my DKU verse o⁠(⁠(⁠*⁠^⁠▽⁠^⁠*⁠)⁠)⁠o
